---
title: "Gallery"
toc: true
---

Content I made with Quarto.

## Reports

- INMETRO PBEV 2026 — Vehicular CO₂ emissions EDA:
  <https://leocarletto.github.io/INMETRO_PBEV2026_eda/relatorio.html>

## Presentations

- (add your slides here)

## Websites

- This site: <https://leocarletto.github.io>
